text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're halfway through the academy's summer camp, and Nature has
already gotten a lot better at running on the beach.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Phew... Well? Has my time improved or what?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her results speak volumes to how much work she's been putting in
these past few days.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I can run pretty well on sand now, but I wonder if that'll transfer to the
track.
choice_data_list: You've got first place in the bag!
You've got first place in the bag!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nah, no way it's gonna be that easy. For one thing, everyone's
training just as hard as we are.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I probably shouldn't be saying that in front of the trainer
who's been helping me train from dawn to dusk every day.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Haha, let's just chalk it up to a defect in my personality. Old habits
die hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We keep going back and forth like this for a while...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I didn't know there was gonna be a festival—I should've brought my
yukata.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, you can have fun at a festival no matter what you're
wearing.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh, so there's a festival going on today.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, good idea.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I've got a soft spot for festivals. Especially the smaller ones—like at
the local park.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I used to go with my friends, and we'd get up to all kinds of hijinks.
Man, good times, good times.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I may not look it, but they used to call me the dancing queen!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, not like anyone cares though. But hey, having festival dancing
as one of my only talents is pretty on-brand, don'tcha think?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Anyways, that's enough about the past. Let's go see that festival!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Man, nothing beats a summer festival.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Now, where to first? There's noodles, grilled corn... Oh, grilled squid
sounds good too!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I've been training my butt off, so I think I deserve a little treat!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you gotta let loose a bit more. I can't be the only one getting
all excited.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Nature and I spend some time walking around the festival...

text_block_list.name: Festival Organizer
text_block_list.text: You can register for the Festival Dance Grand Prix here!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: The Festival Dance Grand Prix?
choice_data_list: It'd be nice to see you in action.
It'd be nice to see you in action.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?! No no no no, wait just a second now.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I said my friends thought I was good at dancing, not that I was
competition material.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: If I'm gonna dance, I'd rather it be in a small park with people I know.
choice_data_list: Are you calling your friends liars?
Are you calling your friends liars?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Th-that's not the issue here...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Man, you really do lay it on thick when it comes to coaxing me into
doing something.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Rather than dancing, let's go check out some more stalls! I haven't
tried the butter potatoes yet! C'mon, chop chop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go after Nature, who's already dashed off to the food stalls, leaving
the dancing crowd behind.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Whew... I'm stuffed. Might've gotten ahead of myself on those
skewers.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
All right, I've done what I came here for, so wanna head back? We've
still got training tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just as we're about to leave the festival and go back to the dorm...

text_block_list.name: Festival Organizer
text_block_list.text: Last call to sign up for the Festival Dance Grand Prix!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...H-hey.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You really want to see? My... um, dancing...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
My friends said I was good, but it's really just your everyday festival
dancing...
choice_data_list: I want to see you dance!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha... I see. Then I'll enter.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But don't get your hopes up too high, okay? It's been a minute since
I've done any sort of dancing.
choice_data_list:
If you're entering, you might as well aim for the
gold!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Were you even listening to what I just said?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Nature signs herself up for the Festival Dance Grand Prix.

text_block_list.name: Festival Organizer
text_block_list.text: This year's Festival Dance Grand Prix winner is...

text_block_list.name: Festival Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Number 12! Hailing from Tracen Academy, it's the Umamusume—Nice
Natty!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It's Nice Nature. Wait, no way? M-me?!

text_block_list.name: Festival Organizer
text_block_list.text:
Your enthusiastic performance went straight after our hearts. All the
judges picked you unanimously. Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you very much...

text_block_list.name: Festival Organizer
text_block_list.text: Let's have a round of applause for our winner—Nice Natty!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap clap clap!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Like I said, it's not Natty—Ah, thank you, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wow... didn't think I'd win the whole thing.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, thanks. I'm still not sure what got into me, signing up for a
contest like that.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Who knows... maybe your bottomless optimism has started rubbing off
on me.
choice_data_list:
Maybe you're just starting to believe in yourself
a bit more?

Maybe you're just starting to believe in yourself
a bit more?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah yeah, don't worry—I'm still the same wet blanket.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
All right, tomorrow it's back to training! Maybe I'll be the winner in my
next race, too. One can always dream, right?
